relation to this policy. The Personal Information that we collect is used for providing and improving                    the Service. We will not use or share your information with anyone except as described                    in this Privacy Policy.

Permission to record audioOur app does not collective any data from the customers. The only reason that the app has the permissionandroid.permission.RECORD_AUDIOis that it is required for a music visualizer in Android. It it is simply not possible to make a music visualizerwithout this permission, but the app does not record any audio.
Information Collection and UseThis app collects and transmits the Android advertising identifier. This is necessary to show commercials and ads. The
information that we request will be retained by us and used as described in this privacy policy.The app does use third party services that may collect information used to identify you.
